TextRun.Text: sb. to do sth. =assist sb. in/with sth.
a prosperous country to live in

RichText.Text: 1. release sb./sth. from... release a statement/report/research a report released by the government 2. jump to second place globally 3. surpass the United Kingdom 4. its highest ranking at a height of 30 meters 5. a research assistant assist sb. to do sth. =assist sb. in/with sth. with the assistance/help of... 6. emphasize the power of firsthand experience 7. reshape perceptions perceive China as a prosperous country to live in 8. anybody with biases 9. China's technological advancement 10. the political and economic forces of China 11. receive many likes

TextRun.Text: 1. 将某人/某物从……中释放出来
9. 中国的技术的/科技的进步

RichText.Text: 1. 将某人/某物从……中释放出来 发布声明/报告/研究 政府发布的报告 2. 跃升至全球第二位 3. 超过英国 4. 其最高排名 在30米的高度 5. 研究助理/助手 帮助某人做某事； 在……的协助下 6. 强调亲身体验的力量 7. 重塑认知； 认为中国是一个宜居的繁荣国家 8. 任何抱有偏见的人 9. 中国的技术的/科技的进步 10. 中国的政治的和经济的力量 11. 获得大量点赞/喜爱
